entry.title: IDC SAQMMA16D0136 (P00039) awarded to AAR GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: agencies must first contact INL/A's Contracting Officer to see if desired work is within the scope of the contract

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. UNDER SECTION J, LIST OF ATTACHMENTS, A. ADD J.1.3 PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT CHANGE TABLE DATED 10/13/2021. THE MASTER PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT IS HOSTED IN THE SEESOR DATABASE LOCATED AT HTTPS://INLA.SEESOR.NET. B. DELETE J.4.3 PROGRAM DIRECTIVES IN ITS ENTIRETY AND REPLACE IT WITH THE ATTACHED J.4.3 PROGRAM DIRECTIVES DATED 09/14/2021. C. DELETE J.8.3 SECURITY CLEARANCE REQUIREMENTS AND REPLACE IT WITH THE ATTACHED J.8.3 SECURITY CLEARANCE REQUIREMENTS DATED 10/12/2021. D. DELETE J.21.3 OY3 DEPLOYMENT SCHEDULE AND REPLACE IT WITH THE ATTACHED J.31.3 OY3 DEPLOYMENT SCHEDULE DATED 10/05/2021.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

entry.title: IDC SAQMMA16D0136 (P00040) awarded to AAR GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION YEAR FOUR IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR CLAUSE 52.217-9 OPTION TO EXTEND THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT (MAR 2000) FOR THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FROM 11/01/2021 TO 10/31/2022.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION
